hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|mts|cts|json|jsonc)$' | xargs -r pnpm exec biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown=true --reporter=summary >&2 || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)'; then out=$(pnpm exec biome check --changed --since=main --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown=true --reporter=summary 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "Biome check failed on changed files. CI will reject this commit." >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "Fix: run 'pnpm exec biome check --changed --since=main --write' to apply safe fixes, then resolve any remaining lint errors before committing." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
